titleStmt.title: SII 26.656: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 656. (A.R. No. 615 of 1909.) TIRUCHCHIRAI, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Śāra-Paramēśvara temple at Uḍaiyārkōyil, a hamlet of the village.

This inscription records a gift of 20 kāśu for burning a nandā lamp using, one uḻakku of ghee in the temple of the god Tiruchchenneri-uḍaiyār of Tiruchcheṟai, by a certain Nittakalliyāṇamaṇḍai alias Tiruviḷakkunambi of the same place. This gift was received, with an undertaking to burn the lamp, by the Śivabrāhmaṇas Kāmakāyaṉ Jayaṅgoṇḍāṉ Kuṉikkumpirāṉ, Māḍilaṉ Ambalaṅkōyil-koṇḍāṉ Śērai-nāyakaṉ, Āttiraiyaṉ Bhaṭṭaṉ Karuvuṇāyakaṉ and Kāśiyapaṉ Tiruvaiyāṟuḍaiyāṉ Paramāṟaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanacakkaravattikaḷ rājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 7 vatu tiruc ceṟai tiruccenneṟi Uṭaiyār koyilil kāṇiuṭaiya civa
brāhmaṇaril kāmakāyaṉ jayaṅkoṇṭāṉ kuṉikkum pirāṉum māṭilaṉ Ampalaṅkoyil koṇṭāṉ ceṟai nāyakaṉum Āttirai
yaṉ paṭṭaṉ karuvuṇāyakaṉum kāciyapaṉ tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyāṉ paramāṟamaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivvaṉaivom Ivvūr Irukkum veḷḷā
ḷaṉ nitta kalli[yāṇaṉ ] maṇṭaiyāna tiruviḷakku nampikku nāṅkaḷ Upaiyattiṭṭukkuṭutta paricāvatu Ivaṉ pakkal Ikkoyilile naṟuney nittam Uḻakku ne
yyāl Ācantirakālam tirunontāviḷakku Oṉṟu Erikka kaṭavomāka koṇṭa kācu 2 10 Ikkācu Irupatukkum poṉkoṇṭu poliyūṭṭāka Erikka kaṭavomākavum Ikkoyi
lil kāṇi Eṅkaḷ pakkal vilaiyālum Oṟṟiyālum Aṭaikoṇṭum Apāpattālum peṟṟuṭaiyarāyp paṭikaṭantu pukkāre Erikka kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippa
ṭi Ikkoyilile kalveṭṭikkoḷḷak kaṭavatāka Icaintu tiṭṭukkuṭuttom Innitta kalliyāṇaṉ maṇṭaiyāna tiruviḷakku nampikku Ikkuṉikku
mpirāṉ Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivvaṉaivom Itu panmāheśvararakṣai ....
Digital edition of SII 26.656 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
